narration: First we compute the total sum of the whole array, which is 28.
callout: The whole total helps us figure out the right side later.

narration: At index 3, leftSum is 11. The rightSum becomes 28 - 11 - 6 = 11.
decision: leftSum equals rightSum here, so index 3 is the pivot.

narration: The current value is removed from the right side because it belongs to the pivot itself, not to either side.
callout: That formula keeps the two sides fair.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why would the right sum be too big if we forgot to subtract the current value?
reflectionPrompt.placeholder: It would be too big because...
